title: Check the file system to verify if the linkedin-viral-orch skill
job:
Check the file system to verify if the linkedin-viral-orch skill was created successfully.

Task:
1. Check if `skills/linkedin-viral-orch/` directory exists
2. List all files and subdirectories if it exists
3. Check if `skills/active/linkedin-viral-orch` symlink exists
4. Report back the full folder structure found (or confirm it doesn't exist)

This will tell us if the job completed successfully and built the entire skill structure.
